summary: PS Munnin MVP smoke test — backend endpoints and full frontend flow validated end-to-end against public URL. All 8 backend cases passed (health, create/list/get/delete searches, background pipeline, leads sorting, email/whatsapp message generation, invalid region -> failed status). Frontend flow passed: nova pesquisa -> pipeline running -> Concluída with leads -> lead detail (name/score/issues) -> generate message -> whatsapp toggle changes body -> copy button visible -> dashboard lists searches.
passed: POST /api/searches (restaurante/Florianópolis, limit 8) -> pending; pipeline finished in ~5s with 7 leads, status=done
GET /api/searches lists searches (3 present, latest first)
GET /api/searches/{id} returns {search, leads}; leads sorted by score desc (verified True)
Invalid region CidadeQueNaoExisteXYZ123 -> search.status=failed, error='Região não encontrada: ...'
Frontend: /nova-pesquisa form (nicho/regiao/limit slider/submit) submits and redirects to /pesquisas/:id
Frontend: SearchDetail shows psm-search-status transitioning from 'Analisando…' to 'Concluída' with 9 psm-lead-card items
Frontend: Lead detail page renders psm-lead-detail-name ('Armazém da Nina'), psm-lead-detail-score (92), psm-lead-detail-issues visible
Frontend: message generation (email) shows body 580 chars containing lead name; whatsapp toggle shows different body (409 chars); psm-lead-message-copy visible
Frontend: Dashboard renders 4 psm-search-list-item cards including a Falhou state showing the error message
notes: Empty-state dashboard was not exercised because DB already contained prior searches, but SearchDetail failure card is rendered correctly (Falhou + error text). psm-form-limit is a range slider (not text input); scripts must set value via input event dispatch. Pipeline was significantly faster than expected (~5s) — likely due to Overpass responding quickly.
